creator: jeffrey_in_nyc
caption:
FREE Flowers at @loweshomeimprovement for Mother’s Day Weekend - Saturday May 9th!

The Deal:
- Show up Saturday May 9th at 10am
- The First 150 MyLowe’s Rewards Members to show up that morning at each Lowe’s will get flowers for FREE
- No purchase necessary

#free #flowers #freebie #deals #lowes

transcription.text: You can get free flowers at Lowe's for Mother's Day. Starting at 10 a.m. on Saturday, May 9th, the first 150 guests at each Lowe's will get a free flower with no purchase necessary.
